name: celigo-integration
description: Celigo iPaaS integration via MCP. Manage integrations, flows, jobs, errors, connections, and scripts.

api_key.title: Celigo API Key
api_key.description: Your Celigo integrator.io API key. Find it in Celigo → Settings → API tokens.

api_url.title: API URL
api_url.description: Celigo API base URL (leave default unless using a custom endpoint).

tools.name: celigo_get_integration_errors
tools.description: Get error summary for an integration

tools.name: celigo_get_flow_errors
tools.description: Get error counts per flow step

tools.name: celigo_list_step_errors
tools.description: List errors for a flow step

tools.name: celigo_list_edi_integrations
tools.description: List all EDI trading partner integrations with partner name, network type (VAN/SPS/direct), and staging status

tools.name: celigo_get_edi_error_summary
tools.description: Aggregated error counts across all active EDI integrations, ranked by partner

tools.name: celigo_get_edi_flow_summary
tools.description: Detailed flow status for one EDI trading partner, grouped by document type (850/856/810 etc.)

tools.name: celigo_get_edi_health_dashboard
tools.description: High-level health dashboard across all active EDI partners: flow counts, errors, doc types, network
